name: Citychamp Dartong Co., Ltd.
summary: Citychamp Dartong Co., Ltd. engages in real estate development and special enameled wire businesses in China and internationally. The company also researches, develops, produces, and sells enameled wires under the Wuyi brand; develops, produces, and sells lithium-ion battery electrolyte additives; and operates Le Mirador Resort & Spa, a five-star luxury hotel that consists of 61 rooms, Mirador medical center, Givenchy seven-star spa center, restaurant, conference room, gymnasium, indoor heated pool, and other facilities. In addition, it provides financial services. Citychamp Dartong Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
